children.heading: Requirement
children.label: a Requirement
children.text: The Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable, shall establish a uniform system to service the Federal credit instruments made available under this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: the costs of services of expert firms retained pursuant to subsection (d); and

children.label: B
children.text: all or a portion of the costs to the Federal Government of servicing the Federal credit instruments provided under this chapter.

children.heading: Prohibition on pass through fees
children.label: 2 Prohibition on pass through fees
children.text: The Administrator, in the case where a State infrastructure financing authority obtains financial assistance under , shall require as a condition of obtaining such assistance, that the State infrastructure financing authority is prohibited from passing any portion of the fees required under to any party that utilizes any portion of such assistance for a project funded by such authority.section 3912(e) of this titlesection 3908(b)(7) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable, may appoint a financial entity to assist the Secretary or the Administrator in servicing the Federal credit instruments provided under this chapter.

children.heading: Duties
children.label: 2 Duties
children.text: A servicer appointed under paragraph (1) shall act as the agent for the Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable.

children.heading: Fee
children.label: 3 Fee
children.text: A servicer appointed under paragraph (1) shall receive a servicing fee, subject to approval by the Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable.

children.heading: Assistance from experts
children.label: d Assistance from experts
children.text: The Secretary or the Administrator, as applicable, may retain the services, including counsel, of organizations and entities with expertise in the field of municipal and project finance to assist in the underwriting and servicing of Federal credit instruments provided under this chapter.

children.heading: Special rule for State reviews of projects for State infrastructure financing authorities
children.label: e Special rule for State reviews of projects for State infrastructure financing authorities
A
children.text: title VI of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act ( et seq.); and33 U.S.C. 1381

children.heading: No new reviews required
children.label: 2 No new reviews required
children.text: Nothing in this title requires any additional or new environmental or engineering review for a project described in for which funding is provided, other than any requirement otherwise applicable to the project.section 3905(9) of this title

children.heading: Special rule for expedited review of applications from State infrastructure financing authorities
children.label: f Special rule for expedited review of applications from State infrastructure financing authorities

children.text: provide detailed guidance and an explanation of any changes to the application necessary for approval of the application.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraphs (3) and (4), the Administrator may enter into an agreement with another relevant Federal agency to provide assistance in administering and servicing Federal credit instruments that such agency is authorized to make available.

children.heading: Duties
children.label: 2 Duties
children.text: The Administrator may act as an agent for the head of another Federal agency under paragraph (1), subject to the terms of any agreement entered into by the Administrator and the head of such other agency under such clause.

children.label: A
children.text: the availability of funds appropriated to the other Federal agency that may be transferred to the Administrator to carry out an agreement entered into under paragraph (1); and

children.label: B
children.text: the transfer of such funds to the Administrator to carry out such an agreement.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 4 Limitation
children.text: Nothing in this subsection affects the authority of the Administrator with respect to the selection of projects described in paragraphs (1), (8), or (10) of to receive financial assistance under this chapter.section 3905 of this title

children.heading: Applicability of other laws
children.label: h Applicability of other laws
children.text: Section 513 of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act () applies to the construction of a project carried out, in whole or in part, with assistance made available through a Federal credit instrument under this chapter in the same manner that section applies to a treatment works for which a grant is made available under that Act [ et seq.].33 U.S.C. 137233 U.S.C. 1251
